Charles Émile Jacque

2 works in the gallery.

Shepherd with Flock of Sheep at Edge of Wood
by Charles Émile Jacque
France · 1833–1894 · Etching on paper
Flock of Sheep at the Edge of a Wood
by Charles Émile Jacque
France · 1877 · Etching and aquatint on cream laid paper
